compiled_state.title: Remove tdd-workflow skill and all references

Remove all tdd-workflow references from 14 files: CLAUDE.md, check-skill-refs.sh, test-qualify-skill-refs.sh, evals.json (3 entries), fix-bug/SKILL.md, using-lockpick/SKILL.md, using-lockpick/HOOK-INJECTION.md, architect-foundation/SKILL.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, dso-config.example.conf, dso-config.conf, examples/CLAUDE.md.example, .test-index. comments.body:
I don't see a ticket description in your message. The "TICKET:" section is empty, which means I cannot determine what changes need to be made or which files would be affected.

Please provide the ticket details (title, description, requirements, etc.) so I can analyze which source and test files are most likely to be modified.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/skills/tdd-workflow/ directory does not exist
  Verify: test ! -d plugins/dso/skills/tdd-workflow
- [ ] .claude/commands/tdd-workflow.md does not exist
  Verify: test ! -f .claude/commands/tdd-workflow.md
- [ ] No tdd-workflow references remain in CLAUDE.md
  Verify: { grep -q tdd-workflow CLAUDE.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] No tdd-workflow references remain in check-skill-refs.sh
  Verify: { grep -q tdd-workflow plugins/dso/scripts/check-skill-refs.sh; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] No tdd-workflow references in fix-bug/SKILL.md
  Verify: { grep -q tdd-workflow plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] No tdd-workflow references in evals.json
  Verify: { grep -q tdd-workflow tests/evals/evals.json; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh passes GREEN (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh
comments.author: Test
